nodes.context: Organised street gang based in Tottenham, North London, active from 1970s to mid-2000s, involved in drug trafficking, weapon trafficking, armed robbery, kidnapping, and contract killing.
Local gang formed in the 1970s by Black British youth of West Indian origins, from which Tottenham Mandem derived.
Independent group that splintered from Tottenham Mandem in the early 2000s.
Independent group that splintered from Tottenham Mandem in the early 2000s.
Independent group that splintered from Tottenham Mandem in the early 2000s.
Gang with which younger members of TMD began to associate in the early 2000s.
Group used by younger TMD members associating with London Bloods.
Group used by younger TMD members associating with London Bloods.
Name used by some older members of TMD in the early 2000s; active in road rap scene.
Collective term for everyone from the Broadwater Farm estate.
UK drill collective formed by members of Star Gang, including Headie One and RV.
London gang mentioned as having similar origins to TMD.
London gang mentioned as having similar origins to TMD.
Local gang that had a conflict with TMD from 1997 to 2003.
North London gang allied with TMD; member Anthony Bourne involved in kidnapping with TMD.
UK garage crew for which TMD members acted as promoters via North Star.
Music record label and group formed by TMD members Clint Ponton and Wesley Lambie in early 2000s.
Gang listed as an ally of Tottenham Mandem in the infobox.
Gang listed as an ally of Tottenham Mandem in the infobox.
Gang listed as a rival of Tottenham Mandem in the infobox.
Organised street gang based in Tottenham, North London, active since before 1985.
Split-off group from TMD located in Northumberland Park estate, Tottenham.
Split-off group from TMD.
Split-off group from TMD.
Group formed by younger TMD members associating with London Bloods.
Group formed by younger TMD members associating with London Bloods.
Group formed by younger TMD members associating with London Bloods.
Offshoot group from TMD, formed by older members, active in road rap scene.
Collective term for fragmentations from TMD on Broadwater Farm estate.
Current gang associated with Broadwater Farm Estate, preceded by Star Gang.
Gang based in South London.
Younger members of Ghetto Boys.
Group formed by TMD and Ghetto Boys members.
Jamaican gang allegedly linked to Shower Syndicate.
Gang from Edmonton, rival of NPK.
Rival gang of NPK.
Rival gang of NPK.

edges.evidence_quote: The gang is a derivative of another local gang known as the Broadwater Farm Posse, formed in the 1970s by Black British youth of West Indian origins.
edges.context: Tottenham Mandem derived from Broadwater Farm Posse.

edges.evidence_quote: TMD also declined during this period, instead splintering off into various independent groups such as NPK (Northumberland Park Killers), Tiverton Mandem, and Chestnut Estate (CE, also known as Black Gang)
edges.context: NPK splintered from TMD.

edges.evidence_quote: TMD also declined during this period, instead splintering off into various independent groups such as NPK (Northumberland Park Killers), Tiverton Mandem, and Chestnut Estate (CE, also known as Black Gang)
edges.context: Tiverton Mandem splintered from TMD.

edges.evidence_quote: TMD also declined during this period, instead splintering off into various independent groups such as NPK (Northumberland Park Killers), Tiverton Mandem, and Chestnut Estate (CE, also known as Black Gang)
edges.context: Chestnut Estate splintered from TMD.

edges.evidence_quote: Some younger members of TMD began to associate with the London Bloods and used names such as Ida Boys (also known as Ida Rydaz, Ida Bloodstarz, or IDA ), and Bloodline or Bloodgang
edges.context: Younger TMD members associated with London Bloods.

edges.evidence_quote: whereas some older members began to use the name 'Star Gang'
edges.context: Older TMD members used the name Star Gang, indicating a splinter or rebranding.

edges.evidence_quote: Collectively, everyone from the Broadwater Farm estate began to be referred to as 'Farm Mandem' (FMD).
edges.context: Farm Mandem is a collective term for Broadwater Farm estate residents, including TMD members.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1997, TMD had a conflict with another local gang known as the Hackney Boys (also known as Hackney Mandem, or HMD).
edges.context: TMD and Hackney Boys were in conflict from 1997 to 2003.

edges.evidence_quote: Anthony Bourne, member of TMD allies Edmonton Firm
edges.context: Edmonton Firm was an ally of TMD.

edges.evidence_quote: The group started putting on UK garage events and acted as the promoters for UK garage crew So Solid.
edges.context: TMD members via North Star acted as promoters for So Solid Crew.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Broadwater Farm Posse, Burger Bar Boys, Causeway Gang, Edmonton Firm (also known as The Firm, Edmonton Mandem, or EMD), Star Gang
edges.context: Burger Bar Boys listed as an ally of Tottenham Mandem in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Broadwater Farm Posse, Burger Bar Boys, Causeway Gang, Edmonton Firm (also known as The Firm, Edmonton Mandem, or EMD), Star Gang
edges.context: Causeway Gang listed as an ally of Tottenham Mandem in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Northumberland Park Killers (NPK), Hackney Boys, London Field Boys (LFB)
edges.context: London Field Boys listed as a rival of Tottenham Mandem in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Northumberland Park Killers (NPK), Hackney Boys, London Field Boys (LFB)
edges.context: NPK listed as a rival of Tottenham Mandem in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Two members of Star Gang, Headz (now known as Headie One ) and Young RV (now known as RV ), later became prominent in the UK drill scene and formed part of the UK drill collective OFB (Original Farm Boys).
edges.context: Members of Star Gang formed part of OFB.

edges.evidence_quote: NPK (Northumberland Park Killers), also known as Sin Squad, are a split-off group from TMD located in the Northumberland Park estate of Tottenham.
edges.context: NPK is a split-off group from TMD.

edges.evidence_quote: Some of the Tottenham split-offs from TMD were Ida Boys, NPK (Northumberland Park Killers), Chestnut Estate (CE, also known as Black Gang), and Tiverton Mandem.
edges.context: Chestnut Estate is a split-off group from TMD.

edges.evidence_quote: Some of the Tottenham split-offs from TMD were Ida Boys, NPK (Northumberland Park Killers), Chestnut Estate (CE, also known as Black Gang), and Tiverton Mandem.
edges.context: Tiverton Mandem is a split-off group from TMD.

edges.evidence_quote: Some of the younger members of TMD had begun to associate with the London Bloods movement and began calling themselves Ida Boys (also known as Ida Rydaz, Ida Bloodstarz, or IDA), Bloodline or Bloodgang, and BWF (Broadwater Farm).
edges.context: Ida Boys formed from younger TMD members.

edges.evidence_quote: Some of the younger members of TMD had begun to associate with the London Bloods movement and began calling themselves Ida Boys (also known as Ida Rydaz, Ida Bloodstarz, or IDA), Bloodline or Bloodgang, and BWF (Broadwater Farm).
edges.context: Bloodline formed from younger TMD members.

edges.evidence_quote: Some of the younger members of TMD had begun to associate with the London Bloods movement and began calling themselves Ida Boys (also known as Ida Rydaz, Ida Bloodstarz, or IDA), Bloodline or Bloodgang, and BWF (Broadwater Farm).
edges.context: BWF formed from younger TMD members.

edges.evidence_quote: 'Star Gang' was also formed during this period, created by older members of TMD.
edges.context: Star Gang was created by older TMD members.

edges.evidence_quote: Collectively, some of the fragmentations were all known as 'Farm Mandem' (FMD), and they still had links to older TMD members.
edges.context: Farm Mandem is a collective term for fragmentations from TMD, with links to older TMD members.

edges.evidence_quote: OFB (Original Farm Boys) is the current gang associated with the Broadwater Farm Estate. They were preceded by Star Gang, a road rap group from the 2000s, an offshoot group from TMD which consisted of Headz (now known as Headie One) and Young RV (now known as RV), who later became prominent in the UK drill scene and formed part of the UK drill collective OFB.
edges.context: OFB was preceded by Star Gang, which was an offshoot from TMD.

edges.evidence_quote: Together, members of TMD and the Ghetto Boys called themselves 'Shower Syndicate'.
edges.context: Shower Syndicate was formed by TMD and Ghetto Boys members.

edges.evidence_quote: Together, members of TMD and the Ghetto Boys called themselves 'Shower Syndicate'.
edges.context: Shower Syndicate was formed by TMD and Ghetto Boys members.

edges.evidence_quote: It is alleged the group had links with the Jamaican gang Shower Posse.
edges.context: Shower Syndicate allegedly had links with Shower Posse.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2007, a fight occurred between members of the NPK and the Shankstarz, a gang from neighbouring Edmonton, following an attempted ambush on two Shankstarz members; the ambush was revenge for the attack of an NPK member at a club in Forest Gate.
edges.context: NPK and Shankstarz engaged in a fight in 2007.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2011, Bienvenu Vangu, a member of the rival Wood Green Young Guns, attacked 2 members of NPK with an axe.
edges.context: Wood Green Young Guns attacked NPK members.

edges.evidence_quote: On 3 February 2018, Kwabena Nelson, also known as Kobi and a former member of NPK, was stabbed to death by members of the Wood Green Mob (WGM) following them crashing into his car.
edges.context: Wood Green Mob killed a former NPK member.

edges.evidence_quote: It was also noted in a report by the Integrated Gangs Unit in Haringey that there was increased tensions between the NPK and the Farm Mandem.
edges.context: Increased tensions between NPK and Farm Mandem.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2020, SJ, alongside four others (Sheareem Cookhorn, Tyrell 'Trills' Graham, Shane 'Sneakz' Lyons, and Ojay 'O'Sav' Hamilton), was given a life sentence with a minimum of 21 years, following a court case at the Old Bailey for the murder of Kamali 'K1' Gabbidon-Lynck in Wood Green. The group was said to be linked to the NPK.
edges.context: OFB members were linked to NPK in a murder case.
